productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so original anchor-11 answers the shared cyan release with one bounded score-preserving rebound, keeping 134 SPEED or 175 CARGO visible through existing tether, camera, target-material, player-scale, HUD, spark, and synth owners; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.result: Siege 1 now carries into a visible 5 wood plus 3 obsidian recipe that upgrades the surviving Spike Wall in place to 300 HP with 35 percent guard, while destroyed defenses require starter-cache rebuilding before the same siege number can retry.

lastCompletedUnit.result: Both safe and shortcut routes now carry their authored Windglass score through the original anchor-11 catch and one short cyan rebound. One secured-event descriptor drives score copy, player stretch, anchor response, camera, sparks, and synth before generic ascent resumes.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax, JSON parsing, and diff hygiene passed. Playwright physically completed both routes through 134 SPEED and 175 CARGO cyan release/catch/rebound results, real failure and keyboard recovery, and Advanced closed/open/closed with zero console or page errors. Human View passed first screen, both secured-score frames, failure, and recovery with diagnostics closed. The matched starting-commit and upgraded-build performance comparison measured 119.861 to 125.121 ms average frame time (+4.39%), 8.343 to 7.992 measured FPS, and 152.900 to 166.300 ms p95 (+8.76%) under the same observed host contention; 69 DOM nodes, one canvas, 76 descriptors, 32 ledges, and 277 settled scene nodes remained identical and bounded.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit 951f105aad815320e5a02781e567899319f87a75 published to resolved default branch main after fetch-before-push verification; this repository commit records the publication receipt. ProtoKits remained unchanged and synchronized at bb3d787da372bf001653635d6e57eb7ce54e3c50.

exactNextUnit.goal: Turn the anchor-11 rebound into one score-aware first-swing release toward anchor-12, reusing the existing route-choice score, release, tether, camera, HUD, spark, and synth owners without another state or control.
